
{{< fa location-dot >}} Cra 1 Nº 18A - 10, Bogotá, Colombia.

{{< fa building >}} Universidad de los Andes, Hermes Building, 201 (CH-201).

{{< fa envelope >}} a.reyes@uniandes.edu.co


```{=html}
<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d31815.668198550386!2d-74.0870103652344!3d4.60145120000004!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x8e3f99a4a139d173%3A0x9450ef2bb74cd95b!2sCra.%201%20%2318a-10%2C%20Bogot%C3%A1!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sco!4v1691281105033!5m2!1sen!2sco" width="900" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
```
